<asp>
% Input and color facts are injected automatically

% ----------------------------------------------------------------------
% Helper predicates for non‑zero cells
% ----------------------------------------------------------------------
nonzero(R,C,V) :- input(R,C,V), color(V), V != 0.

% ----------------------------------------------------------------------
% The frame colour is the colour that appears at the top‑left corner
% of the bounding rectangle of all non‑zero cells.
% ----------------------------------------------------------------------
frame_colour(F) :-
    (R = #min{R2 : nonzero(R2,_,_)}) ;
    (C = #min{C2 : nonzero(_,C2,_)}) ;
    nonzero(R,C,F) ;
    color(F) ;
    F != 0.

% ----------------------------------------------------------------------
% Offsets for 4‑connected movement
% ----------------------------------------------------------------------
delta(0,1).  delta(0,-1).  delta(1,0).  delta(-1,0).

% ----------------------------------------------------------------------
% Cells on the outer edge of the whole grid that are not the frame colour
% ----------------------------------------------------------------------
outer(R,C) :-
    (R = 0) ;
    (R = #max{R2 : input(R2,_,_)}) ;
    (C = 0) ;
    (C = #max{C2 : input(_,C2,_)}) ;
    input(R,C,V), color(V), V != frame_colour.

% ----------------------------------------------------------------------
% Flood‑fill from the outer border through cells that are not the frame colour
% ----------------------------------------------------------------------
outside(R,C) :- outer(R,C).
outside(R2,C2) :- outside(R1,C1), delta(DR,DC),
                R2 = R1+DR, C2 = C1+DC,
                input(R2,C2,V), color(V), V != frame_colour.

% ----------------------------------------------------------------------
% Interior cells – non‑frame cells that cannot be reached from the outer border
% ----------------------------------------------------------------------
interior(R,C) :- input(R,C,V), color(V), V != frame_colour, not outside(R,C).

% ----------------------------------------------------------------------
% Corner cells of the interior rectangle (four extreme positions)
% ----------------------------------------------------------------------
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = #min{R2 : interior(R2,_)}) , (C = #min{C2 : interior(_,C2)}).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = #min{R2 : interior(R2,_)}) , (C = #max{C2 : interior(_,C2)}).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = #max{R2 : interior(R2,_)}) , (C = #min{C2 : interior(_,C2)}).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = #max{R2 : interior(R2,_)}) , (C = #max{C2 : interior(_,C2)}).

% ----------------------------------------------------------------------
% Output facts
%   – corners become 0 if they were already 0, otherwise they become the frame colour
%   – all other interior cells become the frame colour
% ----------------------------------------------------------------------
output(R,C,0) :- interior(R,C), corner(R,C), input(R,C,0).
output(R,C,F) :- interior(R,C), corner(R,C), input(R,C,V), color(V), V != 0, frame_colour(F).
output(R,C,F) :- interior(R,C), not corner(R,C), frame_colour(F).

% ----------------------------------------------------------------------
% Exactly one answer set: each interior cell appears exactly once, no extra output
% ----------------------------------------------------------------------
output_cell(R,C) :- interior(R,C).
:- #count{R : output(R,_,_)} = #count{R : interior(R,_) }.
:- output(R,C,_), not interior(R,C).
</asp>

% Offsets for 4‑connected movement
delta(0,1).  delta(0,-1).  delta(1,0).  delta(-1,0).

% Global dimensions (max index of the grid)
GridMaxRow = #max{R : input(R,_,_) }.
GridMaxCol = #max{C : input(_,C,_) }.

% Non‑zero cells
nonzero(R,C,V) :- input(R,C,V), color(V), V != 0.

% Bounding rectangle of the non‑zero cells
MinRow = #min{R : nonzero(R,_,_) }.
MaxRow = #max{R : nonzero(R,_,_) }.
MinCol = #min{C : nonzero(_,C,_) }.
MaxCol = #max{C : nonzero(_,C,_) }.

% Frame colour – colour at the top‑left corner of that rectangle
frame_colour(F) :-
    nonzero(R,C,F),
    color(F),
    F != 0,
    R = MinRow,
    C = MinCol.

% Flood‑fill from the outer border through cells that are not the frame colour
outer(R,C,F) :-
    (R = 0) ; (R = GridMaxRow) ; (C = 0) ; (C = GridMaxCol),
    input(R,C,V), color(V), V != F.
outside(R,C,F) :- outer(R,C,F).
outside(R2,C2,F) :-
    outside(R1,C1,F),
    delta(DR,DC),
    R2 = R1 + DR,
    C2 = C1 + DC,
    R2 >= 0, R2 <= GridMaxRow,
    C2 >= 0, C2 <= GridMaxCol,
    input(R2,C2,V), color(V), V != F.

% Interior cells – non‑frame coloured cells that are not reachable from the outer border
interior(R,C) :-
    frame_colour(F),
    nonzero(R,C,V), V != F,
    not outside(R,C,F).

% Bounds of the interior region
Imin = #min{R : interior(R,_) }.
Imax = #max{R : interior(R,_) }.
Jmin = #min{C : interior(_,C)}.
Jmax = #max{C : interior(_,C)}.

% Corner cells of the interior rectangle (any cell on its border)
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imin) ; (R = Imax) ; (C = Jmin) ; (C = Jmax).

% Output for each interior cell
output(Rout,Cout,0) :-
    interior(R,C),
    corner(R,C),
    input(R,C,V), color(V), V = 0,
    Rout = R - Imin,
    Cout = C - Jmin.
output(Rout,Cout,F) :-
    interior(R,C),
    corner(R,C),
    input(R,C,V), color(V), V != 0,
    frame_colour(F),
    Rout = R - Imin,
    Cout = C - Jmin.
output(Rout,Cout,F) :-
    interior(R,C),
    not corner(R,C),
    frame_colour(F),
    Rout = R - Imin,
    Cout = C - Jmin.

% Exactly one answer set – each interior cell gets exactly one colour
output_cell(R,C) :- interior(R,C).

1 { output(R,C,Col) : color(Col) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

% Unique frame colour
:- #count(F : frame_colour(F)) = 1.

% No extra output outside the interior rectangle
:- not output(R,C,_) : not output_cell(R,C).
</asp>

<asp>
% 4‑connected movement offsets
delta(0,1).
delta(0,-1).
delta(1,0).
delta(-1,0).

% non‑zero cells
nonzero(R,C,V) :- input(R,C,V), color(V), V != 0.

% bounding rectangle of non‑zero cells
min_row_nz = #min{R : nonzero(R,_,_) }.
max_row_nz = #max{R : nonzero(R,_,_) }.
min_col_nz = #min{C : nonzero(_,C,_) }.
max_col_nz = #max{C : nonzero(_,C,_) }.

% frame colour – colour at the top‑left corner of the non‑zero rectangle
frame_colour(F) :- input(min_row_nz, min_col_nz, F), color(F), F != 0.

% border cells – cells on the perimeter of the non‑zero rectangle
outer_cell(R,C,V,F) :- (R = min_row_nz) ; (R = max_row_nz) ; (C = min_col_nz) ; (C = max_col_nz),
    input(R,C,V), color(V), V != F.

% flood‑fill from the border through cells that are not the frame colour
outside(R,C,F) :- outer_cell(R,C,V,F).
outside(R2,C2,F) :-
    outside(R1,C1,F),
    delta(DR,DC),
    R2 = R1 + DR,
    C2 = C1 + DC,
    input(R2,C2,V2), color(V2),
    V2 != F,
    R2 >= min_row_nz, R2 <= max_row_nz,
    C2 >= min_col_nz, C2 <= max_col_nz.

% interior cells – cells inside the outer rectangle that are NOT reached
interior(R,C,F) :- not outside(R,C,F), input(R,C,V), color(V),
    R >= min_row_nz, R <= max_row_nz,
    C >= min_col_nz, C <= max_col_nz.

% interior cells (independent of the frame colour value)
interior(R,C) :- interior(R,C,F), frame_colour(F).

% bounding rectangle of interior cells
Imin = #min{R : interior(R,_) }.
Imax = #max{R : interior(R,_) }.
Jmin = #min{C : interior(_,C)}.
Jmax = #max{C : interior(_,C)}.

% corners of the interior rectangle
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imin), (C = Jmin).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imin), (C = Jmax).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imax), (C = Jmin).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imax), (C = Jmax).

% output facts for interior cells
output(Rout,Cout,0) :- interior(R,C), corner(R,C), input(R,C,V), color(V), V = 0,
    Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin.

output(Rout,Cout,F) :- interior(R,C), not corner(R,C), Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin.

output(Rout,Cout,F) :- interior(R,C), corner(R,C), input(R,C,V), color(V), V != 0,

<asp>
% 4‑connected movement offsets
delta(0,1).
delta(0,-1).
delta(1,0).
delta(-1,0).

% non‑zero cells
nonzero(R,C,V) :- input(R,C,V), color(V), V != 0.

% outer rectangle of non‑zero cells
min_row_nz = #min{R : nonzero(R,_,_) }.
max_row_nz = #max{R : nonzero(R,_,_) }.
min_col_nz = #min{C : nonzero(_,C,_) }.
max_col_nz = #max{C : nonzero(_,C,_) }.

% frame colour – colour at the top‑left corner of the outer rectangle
frame_colour(F) :- input(min_row_nz, min_col_nz, F), color(F), F != 0.

% border cells (outer rectangle perimeter)
outer_cell(R,C,V,F) :- (R = min_row_nz) ; (R = max_row_nz) ; (C = min_col_nz) ; (C = max_col_nz),
    input(R,C,V), color(V), V != F.

% flood fill from border through cells not equal to the frame colour
outside(R,C,F) :- outer_cell(R,C,V,F).
outside(R2,C2,F) :-
    outside(R1,C1,F),
    delta(DR,DC),
    R2 = R1 + DR,
    C2 = C1 + DC,
    input(R2,C2,V2), color(V2),
    V2 != F,
    R2 >= min_row_nz, R2 <= max_row_nz,
    C2 >= min_col_nz, C2 <= max_col_nz.

% interior cells – inside the outer rectangle and not reached from the border
interior(R,C,F) :- not outside(R,C,F), input(R,C,V), color(V),
    R >= min_row_nz, R <= max_row_nz,
    C >= min_col_nz, C <= max_col_nz.

% interior cells (independent of the concrete colour)
interior(R,C) :- interior(R,C,F), frame_colour(F).

% bounding rectangle of interior cells
Imin = #min{R : interior(R,_) }.
Imax = #max{R : interior(R,_) }.
Jmin = #min{C : interior(_,C)}.
Jmax = #max{C : interior(_,C)}.

% corners of the interior rectangle
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imin), (C = Jmin).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imin), (C = Jmax).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imax), (C = Jmin).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imax), (C = Jmax).

% output for interior cells
output(Rout,Cout,0) :- interior(R,C), corner(R,C), input(R,C,V), color(V), V = 0,
    Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin.

output(Rout,Cout,F) :- interior(R,C), not corner(R,C), Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin, frame_colour(F).

output(Rout,Cout,F) :- interior(R,C), corner(R,C), input(R,C,V), color(V), V != 0,
    Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin, frame_colour(F).

% one output cell per interior cell
output_cell(Rout,Cout) :- interior(R,C), Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin.

% exactly one answer set
1 { output(Rout,Cout,Col) : color(Col) } 1 :- output_cell(Rout,Cout).

</asp>

<asp>
% 4‑connected movement offsets
delta(0,1).
delta(0,-1).
delta(1,0).
delta(-1,0).

% non‑zero cells
nonzero(R,C,V) :- input(R,C,V), color(V), V != 0.

% bounding rectangle of non‑zero cells
min_row_nz = #min{R : nonzero(R,_,_) }.
max_row_nz = #max{R : nonzero(R,_,_) }.
min_col_nz = #min{C : nonzero(_,C,_) }.
max_col_nz = #max{C : nonzero(_,C,_) }.

% frame colour – colour at the top‑left corner of the non‑zero rectangle
frame_colour(F) :- input(min_row_nz, min_col_nz, F), color(F), F != 0.

% border cells (outer rectangle perimeter)
outer_cell(R,C,V,F) :- (R = min_row_nz) ; (R = max_row_nz) ; (C = min_col_nz) ; (C = max_col_nz),
    input(R,C,V), color(V), V != F.

% flood fill from the border through cells that are not the frame colour
outside(R,C,F) :- outer_cell(R,C,V,F).
outside(R2,C2,F) :-
    outside(R1,C1,F),
    delta(DR,DC),
    R2 = R1 + DR,
    C2 = C1 + DC,
    input(R2,C2,V2), color(V2),
    V2 != F,
    R2 >= min_row_nz, R2 <= max_row_nz,
    C2 >= min_col_nz, C2 <= max_col_nz.

% interior cells – inside the outer rectangle and not reached from the border
interior(R,C,F) :- not outside(R,C,F), input(R,C,V), color(V),
    R >= min_row_nz, R <= max_row_nz,
    C >= min_col_nz, C <= max_col_nz.

% interior cells (ignoring the concrete colour)
interior(R,C) :- interior(R,C,F), frame_colour(F).

% bounding rectangle of interior cells
Imin = #min{R : interior(R,_) }.
Imax = #max{R : interior(R,_) }.
Jmin = #min{C : interior(_,C)}.
Jmax = #max{C : interior(_,C)}.

% corners of the interior rectangle
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imin), (C = Jmin).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imin), (C = Jmax).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imax), (C = Jmin).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imax), (C = Jmax).

% output for interior cells
output(Rout,Cout,0) :- interior(R,C), corner(R,C), input(R,C,V), color(V), V != F,
    Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin.

output(Rout,Cout,F) :- interior(R,C), corner(R,C), input(R,C,V), color(V), V = F,
    Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin, frame_colour(F).

output(Rout,Cout,F) :- interior(R,C), not corner(R,C),
    Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin, frame_colour(F).

% one output cell per interior cell
output_cell(Rout,Cout) :- interior(R,C), Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin.

% exactly one answer set
1 { output(Rout,Cout,Col) : color(Col) } 1 :- output_cell(Rout,Cout).

% ensure the frame colour is unique (there is exactly one colour at the top‑left corner)
:- #count(F : frame_colour(F)) = 1.
</asp>

<asp>
% 4‑connected movement offsets
delta(0,1).
delta(0,-1).
delta(1,0).
delta(-1,0).

% non‑zero cells
nonzero(R,C,V) :- input(R,C,V), color(V), V != 0.

% bounding rectangle of non‑zero cells
min_row_nz = #min{R : nonzero(R,_,_) }.
max_row_nz = #max{R : nonzero(R,_,_) }.
min_col_nz = #min{C : nonzero(_,C,_) }.
max_col_nz = #max{C : nonzero(_,C,_) }.

% frame colour – colour at the top‑left corner of the non‑zero rectangle
frame_colour(F) :- input(min_row_nz, min_col_nz, F), color(F), F != 0.

% border cells (outer rectangle perimeter)
outer_cell(R,C,V,F) :- (R = min_row_nz) ; (R = max_row_nz) ; (C = min_col_nz) ; (C = max_col_nz),
    input(R,C,V), color(V), V != F.

% flood fill from the border through cells that are not the frame colour
outside(R,C,F) :- outer_cell(R,C,V,F).
outside(R2,C2,F) :-
    outside(R1,C1,F),
    delta(DR,DC),
    R2 = R1 + DR,
    C2 = C1 + DC,
    input(R2,C2,V2), color(V2),
    V2 != F,
    R2 >= min_row_nz, R2 <= max_row_nz,
    C2 >= min_col_nz, C2 <= max_col_nz.

% interior cells – inside the outer rectangle and not reached from the border
interior(R,C,F) :- not outside(R,C,F), input(R,C,V), color(V),
    R >= min_row_nz, R <= max_row_nz,
    C >= min_col_nz, C <= max_col_nz.

% interior cells (ignoring the concrete colour)
interior(R,C) :- interior(R,C,F), frame_colour(F).

% bounding rectangle of interior cells
Imin = #min{R : interior(R,_) }.
Imax = #max{R : interior(R,_) }.
Jmin = #min{C : interior(_,C)}.
Jmax = #max{C : interior(_,C)}.

% corners of the interior rectangle
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imin), (C = Jmin).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imin), (C = Jmax).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imax), (C = Jmin).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imax), (C = Jmax).

% output for interior cells
output(Rout,Cout,F) :- interior(R,C), corner(R,C), input(R,C,V), color(V), V = F,
    Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin, frame_colour(F).

output(Rout,Cout,0) :- interior(R,C), corner(R,C), input(R,C,V), color(V), V != F,
    frame_colour(F), Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin.

output(Rout,Cout,F) :- interior(R,C), not corner(R,C),
    Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin, frame_colour(F).

% one output cell per interior cell
output_cell(Rout,Cout) :- interior(R,C), Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin.

% exactly one answer set
1 { output(Rout,Cout,Col) : color(Col) } 1 :- output_cell(Rout,Cout).

% the frame colour is unique (exactly the colour at the top‑left corner)
:- #count(F : frame_colour(F)) = 1.
</asp>

<asp>
delta(0,1).
delta(0,-1).
delta(1,0).
delta(-1,0).

nonzero(R,C,V) :- input(R,C,V), color(V), V != 0.

min_row_nz = #min{R : nonzero(R,_,_) }.
max_row_nz = #max{R : nonzero(R,_,_) }.
min_col_nz = #min{C : nonzero(_,C,_) }.
max_col_nz = #max{C : nonzero(_,C,_) }.

frame_colour(F) :- input(min_row_nz, min_col_nz, F), color(F), F != 0.

outer_cell(R,C,V,F) :- (R = min_row_nz) ; (R = max_row_nz) ; (C = min_col_nz) ; (C = max_col_nz), input(R,C,V), color(V), V != F.

outside(R,C,F) :- outer_cell(R,C,V,F).
outside(R2,C2,F) :-
    outside(R1,C1,F),
    delta(DR,DC),
    R2 = R1 + DR,
    C2 = C1 + DC,
    input(R2,C2,V2), color(V2),
    V2 != F,
    R2 >= min_row_nz, R2 <= max_row_nz,
    C2 >= min_col_nz, C2 <= max_col_nz.

interior(R,C,F) :- not outside(R,C,F), input(R,C,V), color(V),
    R >= min_row_nz, R <= max_row_nz,
    C >= min_col_nz, C <= max_col_nz.

interior(R,C) :- interior(R,C,F), frame_colour(F).

Imin = #min{R : interior(R,_) }.
Imax = #max{R : interior(R,_) }.
Jmin = #min{C : interior(_,C)}.
Jmax = #max{C : interior(_,C)}.

corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imin), (C = Jmin).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imin), (C = Jmax).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imax), (C = Jmin).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imax), (C = Jmax).

output(Rout,Cout,F) :- interior(R,C), corner(R,C), input(R,C,V), color(V), V = F,
    Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin, frame_colour(F).

output(Rout,Cout,0) :- interior(R,C), corner(R,C), input(R,C,V), color(V), V != F,
    frame_colour(F), Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin.

output(Rout,Cout,F) :- interior(R,C), not corner(R,C),
    Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin, frame_colour(F).

output_cell(Rout,Cout) :- interior(R,C), Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin.

1 { output(Rout,Cout,Col) : color(Col) } 1 :- output_cell(Rout,Cout).

#count(F : frame_colour(F)) = 1.
</asp>

outer_cell(R,C,V,F) :- (R = min_row_nz), (C >= min_col_nz), (C <= max_col_nz), input(R,C,V), color(V), V != F.
outer_cell(R,C,V,F) :- (R = max_row_nz), (C >= min_col_nz), (C <= max_col_nz), input(R,C,V), color(V), V != F.

outer_cell(R,C,V,F) :- (C = max_col_nz), (R >= min_row_nz), (R <= max_row_nz), input(R,C,V), color(V), V != F.

outside(R,C,F) :- outer_cell(R,C,V,F).
outside(R2,C2,F) :-
    outside(R1,C1,F),
    delta(DR,DC),
    R2 = R1 + DR,
    C2 = C1 + DC,
    input(R2,C2,V2), color(V2),
    V2 != F,
    R2 >= min_row_nz, R2 <= max_row_nz,
    C2 >= min_col_nz, C2 <= max_col_nz.

interior(R,C,F) :- not outside(R,C,F), input(R,C,V), color(V),
    R >= min_row_nz, R <= max_row_nz,
    C >= min_col_nz, C <= max_col_nz.

interior(R,C) :- interior(R,C,F), frame_colour(F).

Imin = #min{R : interior(R,_) }.
Imax = #max{R : interior(R,_) }.
Jmin = #min{C : interior(_,C)}.
Jmax = #max{C : interior(_,C)}.

corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imin), (C = Jmin).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imin), (C = Jmax).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imax), (C = Jmin).
corner(R,C) :- interior(R,C), (R = Imax), (C = Jmax).

output(Rout,Cout,F) :- interior(R,C), corner(R,C), input(R,C,V), color(V), V = F,
    Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin, frame_colour(F).

output(Rout,Cout,0) :- interior(R,C), corner(R,C), input(R,C,V), color(V), V != F,
    frame_colour(F), Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin.

output(Rout,Cout,F) :- interior(R,C), not corner(R,C),
    Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin, frame_colour(F).

output_cell(Rout,Cout) :- interior(R,C), Rout = R - Imin, Cout = C - Jmin.

1 { output(Rout,Cout,Col) : color(Col) } 1 :- output_cell(Rout,Cout).
